note: J6 step 4 — committed tokens-only chokepoint spec (in-process, injected transport, no live model, no api.anthropic.com). Proves every chokepoint entry routes outbound through anonymize BEFORE the transport (tokens only), user-visible response is cleartext, tool_use round-trips locally, tool DEFINITIONS are anonymised, and audit folds into the single Registo write path as metadata only.
command: cd api && npx vitest run tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts --reporter=dot
reporterNote: --reporter=basic from the brief is unavailable in vitest v4.1.10 (removed); used --reporter=dot/verbose.
tests: tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > payload-capture: every entry tokenizes the outbound payload (§17.8, §17.11) > completeFast: outbound is tokens-only; the de-tokenized response is cleartext
tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > payload-capture: every entry tokenizes the outbound payload (§17.8, §17.11) > runOneShot (SDK one-shot): outbound prompt is tokens-only; result is cleartext

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > payload-capture: every entry tokenizes the outbound payload (§17.8, §17.11) > runAgent (SDK stream): outbound prompt is tokens-only; streamed text is cleartext

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > payload-capture: every entry tokenizes the outbound payload (§17.8, §17.11) > proxyGatewayMessages: outbound is tokens-only; tool_use arguments de-tokenize locally

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > payload-capture: every entry tokenizes the outbound payload (§17.8, §17.11) > tool DEFINITIONS are anonymised too - PII in a tool description does not leak (dual-review Critical)
tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > encrypted per-org deny-list is resolved at the chokepoint (§17.4 (b), D3) > decrypts an org-scoped-encrypted deny-list and tokenizes the party

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > encrypted per-org deny-list is resolved at the chokepoint (§17.4 (b), D3) > org-scoping is enforced: another org's ciphertext cannot be decrypted here (§17.4 b, fail-closed)

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > encrypted per-org deny-list is resolved at the chokepoint (§17.4 (b), D3) > encrypted deny-list access is audit-logged as a COUNT on the persisted row (§17.4 b, D3)

tests/llm/anonymise-chokepoint.test.ts > audit folds into the single Registo write path, metadata only (§17.6, §17.11) > writes an anonymisation activity row with classes/counts/correlation-id/hash, no bodies
